rules.name: debug_true_in_production
rules.description: DEBUG=True must never be used in production settings
rules.message: DEBUG=True detected. Ensure this is not in production settings.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use DEBUG = os.getenv('DEBUG', 'False') == 'True' and ensure production has DEBUG=False.

rules.name: secret_key_not_hardcoded
rules.description: Django SECRET_KEY must not be hardcoded
rules.message: Hardcoded Django SECRET_KEY detected. Load it from environment variables.
rules.fix_suggestion: SECRET_KEY = os.environ.get('DJANGO_SECRET_KEY') — store the value in .env.

rules.name: allowed_hosts_not_wildcard
rules.description: ALLOWED_HOSTS must not contain '*' in production
rules.message: ALLOWED_HOSTS=['*'] is insecure. Specify explicit host names in production.
rules.fix_suggestion: Set ALLOWED_HOSTS to a list of your actual domain names.

rules.name: raw_sql_queries
rules.description: Avoid raw SQL — use the ORM to prevent SQL injection
rules.message: Raw SQL query detected. Prefer the Django ORM or use parameterised queries.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use Model.objects.filter() or cursor.execute(sql, [params]) with parameters.

rules.name: avoid_select_related_all
rules.description: Use select_related/prefetch_related for related objects to avoid N+1 queries
rules.message: Fetching all objects without filtering. Consider adding select_related/prefetch_related or filters.
